project: Development of robot automobile operating and development of new generation of assistant systems for operating
title: Vyvoj robotickeho rizeni automobilu a vyvoj nove generace asistencnich systemu pro rizeni

abstract.label: Abstract
abstract.text: The aim of the project is to develop the development of robotic automotive management and the development of a new generation of management assistance systems
